title: hibbertia linearis var. obtusifolia
intro: Hibbertia linearis var. obtusifolia, also known as the Yellow Cow-wheat, is a plant species native to Australia and is characterized by its yellow flowers and linear or lance-shaped leaves. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits associated with the Yellow Cow-wheat include the potential treatment of wounds, skin irritations, and minor infections due to its antimicrobial properties. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support the body's natural healing processes.
